items.title: Amit Shah, Nitin Nabin among BJP top brass meet at PM Modi's residence
items.summary: Top BJP leaders met at Prime Minister Narendra Modi's residence on Wednesday. This meeting occurred just before the Parliament's upcoming session begins next week. The gathering...
